name: Easy-Bake Cheddar Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and thinly slice both the potatoes and onion (either in a food processor or by hand).
2. Pour the contents of the can of condensed soup into an 8 x 8 Pyrex baking dish.
3. Layer the potatoes and onion directly on top of the soup, dotting them with margarine.
4. Bake for 40 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Top with grated cheddar cheese.
6. Return to oven for another 10 minutes or until the cheese has melted.
